name: Hammis Round Drop Leaf Dining Table Wood/Dark Brown - Signature Design by Ashley: Compact, Space-Saving Design, Seats 4
description: You might be short on space, but you can still long for style. If contemporary tantalizes your taste buds, savor the beauty of this sleek drop leaf dining table. Dark and dramatic, it packs plenty of appeal into a compact design. Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
